assessment_objectives.objective: System of Records Notices (SORNs) are drafted in accordance with OMB guidance for systems that process information that will be maintained in a Privacy Act system of records.

new and significantly modified system of records notices are submitted to the OMB and appropriate congressional committees for advance review for systems that process information that will be maintained in a Privacy Act system of records.
System of Records Notices (SORNs) are published in the Federal Register for systems that process information that will be maintained in a Privacy Act system of records.
System of Records Notices (SORNs) are kept accurate, up-to-date and scoped in accordance with policy for systems that process information that will be maintained in a Privacy Act system of records.
